title: [Cobblemon] Trainer Accessories
description: Adds various accessories that give you boosted spawn chances, IVs, catch rates, and more.
body:
# Trainer Accessories! This mod RPG-ifies Cobblemon and integrates it with minecraft's attribute system. This mod gives many of Cobblemon's held items the ability to be worn as accessories and also adds completely new items. As of now there are 33 unique Pokemon charms (not including their shiny variants) as well as 5 Pokeball charms. Each charm has its own effects, with some increasing the IVs of certain types, their chance to spawn or even their chance to be shiny. See all possible effects [here](https://modrinth.com/project/P7tBjBML). ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9067d58379e7181a63c5d88c12fd8854d58abedb.png) ## Obtaining Charms There are *two* ways of obtaining charms, the first is to get lucky when KO'ing a Pokemon (whether through battle or not) with a roughly 0.5% and 0.1% chance for common and rare charms respectively. The second method is obtaining a common or a rare charm capsule; these appear in suspicious gravel at or near ruins, gimmieghoul chests and ancient city chests. ![A common charm capsule](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c30c3b481a5acf3fdf197a3b89ad1ab605c14cac.png) ![A rare charm capsule](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e04e9024c9ca782ed99a729d1fcc130da50e6691.png) ## Orbs The orb charms give large targeted IV boosts allowing you to ensure a certain stat will have at least X number of IVs. Obtaining orbs is quite difficult however, first you'll have to find 9 orb shards to craft an empty orb. Orb shards can either be obtained from gimmieghouls with a 5% chance or they have a guranteed chance to drop from any pokemon that has its hidden ability. After obtaining all 9 shards and crafting an empty orb you're free to craft whichever orb you want with each orb corresponding to the color of it's stat's EV training item equivalent (ex: Power Lens are purple so therefore the purple Erratic Orb gives bonus Sp. Atk IVs). Upon crafting an orb you'll notice a tooltip tracking a certain stat, upon reaching certain milestones the orb's benefits will increase. If you happen to get all 6 orbs for each stat then you can craft a final orb that gives a flat increase to *ALL* IVs. ![Mystic orb crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d473ddc71fa90698a7a7eb7e7e8b97272e85f92.png) ## Misc. Items - *Chipped Relic Coin* → Obtained from KO'ing a Gimmieghoul at a 5% drop rate. - *Key Ring* → Obtained from KO'ing a Klefki at a 10% drop rate. # Important! **ALL** Pokemon and Pokeball models are NOT mine, I did like two edits and then slapped them on an item model. I just thought the concept of you being able to have your favorites on a keychain to give you buffs n stuff was a cool idea. All of the models are straight from the [Cobblemon Github](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon), so kudos to them ofc. If you have any inquiries my DMs are open.
**Discord** → `the_number_two`
